---
title: "Epilepsy Differential Gene Expression Analysis"
output: html_notebook
---

This script performs differential gene expression analysis comparing steep vs flat 1/f in epilepsy neurons.

## 1. Load Libraries

```{r}
library("clusterProfiler")
library("AnnotationDbi")
library("org.Hs.eg.db")
library(EnhancedVolcano)
library(writexl)
library(Seurat)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
```

## 2. Load Neuron-Only Object

```{r}
# Load the neuron-only object with MapMyCells annotations and module scores
# This object was created in script 2 and already filtered to neuronal populations only
neuron_obj_path <- "D:/Youssef Sibih/Seurat_Objects/R1_123125/epilepsy_neurons_sct_MapCells.rds"
neuron_obj_cleaned <- readRDS(neuron_obj_path)

cat("Neuron object loaded successfully!\n")
cat("Total neurons:", ncol(neuron_obj_cleaned), "\n")

# Verify neuronal populations only
if ("class_name" %in% colnames(neuron_obj_cleaned@meta.data)) {
  cat("\nclass_name distribution:\n")
  print(table(neuron_obj_cleaned$class_name, useNA = "ifany"))
  
  # Filter to neuronal populations if any non-neuronal cells exist
  if (any(!neuron_obj_cleaned$class_name %in% c("Neuronal: Glutamatergic", "Neuronal: GABAergic"), na.rm = TRUE)) {
    cat("Filtering to neuronal populations only...\n")
    neuron_obj_cleaned <- subset(neuron_obj_cleaned, 
                                 subset = class_name %in% c("Neuronal: Glutamatergic", "Neuronal: GABAergic"))
    cat("After filtering:", ncol(neuron_obj_cleaned), "neurons\n")
  } else {
    cat("✓ Object already contains only neuronal populations\n")
  }
}

cat("\none_over_f_status groups:\n")
print(table(neuron_obj_cleaned@meta.data$one_over_f_status))
```

## 3. Differential Gene Expression Analysis

```{r}
# Prepare object for SCT-based differential expression
neuron_obj_cleaned <- PrepSCTFindMarkers(neuron_obj_cleaned)

# Set identities to one_over_f_status
Idents(neuron_obj_cleaned) <- "one_over_f_status"

# Run FindMarkers (low1overf vs high1overf)
one_over_F_diff <- FindMarkers(neuron_obj_cleaned, 
                               ident.1 = "low1overf", 
                               ident.2 = "high1overf", 
                               verbose = FALSE)

cat("Differential expression analysis complete\n")
cat("Total differentially expressed genes:", nrow(one_over_F_diff), "\n")
head(one_over_F_diff, n = 15)

# Genes are stored as rownames, moving them to their own column
result <- cbind(Gene = rownames(one_over_F_diff), one_over_F_diff)

# Save results as CSV
csv_dir <- "D:/AbrahamDada/oneoverf/oneoverf_R1_10326/csv"
if (!dir.exists(csv_dir)) {
  dir.create(csv_dir, recursive = TRUE)
}
csv_path <- file.path(csv_dir, "epilepsy_DGE_oneoverf.csv")
write.csv(result, csv_path, row.names = FALSE)
cat("Results saved to:", csv_path, "\n")
```

## 4. Volcano Plot

```{r}
# Define excitatory and inhibitory gene lists for labeling
excitatory_list <- list(c("SLC17A6", "SLC17A7", "SLC17A8", "GRIA1", "GRIA2", "GRIA3", "GRIA4", 
                          "GRIN1", "GRIN2A", "GRIN2B", "GRIN2C", "GRIN2D", "GRIN3A", "GRIN3B", 
                          "GRM1", "GRM2", "GRM3", "GRM4", "GRM5", "GRM6", "GRM7", "GRM8", 
                          "TBR1", "FEZF2", "NEUROD1", "CTIP2", "SATB2", "CAMK2A", "CAMK2B", 
                          "NRGN", "SYT1", "PSD95", "DLG4", "SHANK1", "SHANK2", "SHANK3", 
                          "HOMER1", "HOMER2", "HOMER3", "VAMP1", "VAMP2"))

inhibitory_list <- list(c("GAD1", "GAD2", "SLC32A1", "SLC6A1", "GABRA1", "GABRA2", "GABRA3", 
                          "GABRA4", "GABRA5", "GABRA6", "GABRB1", "GABRB2", "GABRB3", 
                          "GABRG1", "GABRG2", "GABRG3", "GABBR1", "GABBR2", "DLX1", "DLX2", 
                          "DLX5", "DLX6", "ARX", "LHX6", "SST", "PVALB", "CALB1", "CALB2", 
                          "VIP", "CR", "NPY", "GPHN", "NKCC1", "SLC12A2", "KCC2", "SLC12A5"))

combined_list <- unique(c(excitatory_list[[1]], inhibitory_list[[1]]))

# Create a vector for point color
keyvals <- rep("grey", nrow(result))
keyvals[result$avg_log2FC > 0.25] <- "#18bdc2"
keyvals[result$avg_log2FC < -0.25] <- "#f3766e"

names(keyvals) <- rep("NS", length(keyvals))
names(keyvals)[keyvals == "#18bdc2"] <- "FoldChange > 0.25"
names(keyvals)[keyvals == "#f3766e"] <- "FoldChange < -0.25"

# Identify the genes that pass fold-change threshold
threshold_genes <- rownames(result)[abs(result$avg_log2FC) > 0.25]

# Get only the genes that are present in both result and combined list
selected_genes <- intersect(rownames(result), combined_list)
selected_threshold_genes <- intersect(selected_genes, threshold_genes)

# Volcano plot with labels
volcanoPlotWithLabels <- EnhancedVolcano(
  result,
  lab = rownames(result),
  x = "avg_log2FC",
  y = "p_val_adj",
  selectLab = selected_threshold_genes,
  colCustom = keyvals,
  pCutoff = NA,
  FCcutoff = NA,
  cutoffLineType = "blank",
  max.overlaps = Inf,
  drawConnectors = TRUE,
  title = "Volcano Plot: Epilepsy (Flat vs Steep 1/f)"
)

p1 <- volcanoPlotWithLabels + theme(
  panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
  panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
)

# Save plot
plot_dir <- "D:/AbrahamDada/oneoverf/oneoverf_R1_10326/plots"
if (!dir.exists(plot_dir)) {
  dir.create(plot_dir, recursive = TRUE)
}

ggsave(filename = "epilepsy_volcano_labeled.pdf", 
       plot = p1, 
       path = plot_dir, 
       width = 10, height = 8, 
       device = "pdf", dpi = 600)

p1

# Volcano plot without labels
volcanoPlotNoLabels <- EnhancedVolcano(
  result,
  lab = NA,
  x = "avg_log2FC",
  y = "p_val_adj",
  colCustom = keyvals,
  pCutoff = NA,
  FCcutoff = NA,
  cutoffLineType = "blank",
  title = "Volcano Plot: Epilepsy (No Labels)"
)

p2 <- volcanoPlotNoLabels + theme(
  panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
  panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
)

ggsave(filename = "epilepsy_volcano_nolabel.pdf", 
       plot = p2, 
       path = plot_dir, 
       width = 10, height = 8, 
       device = "pdf", dpi = 600)

p2
```

## 5. GO Enrichment - Flat 1/f (Higher in low1overf)

```{r}
# Filter genes with positive log2FC (higher in low1overf) and significant p-value
genes_to_test_low <- rownames(result[result$avg_log2FC > 0.25 & result$p_val_adj < 0.05, ])

cat("Genes higher in flat 1/f:", length(genes_to_test_low), "\n")

if (length(genes_to_test_low) > 0) {
  # Perform GO Enrichment for different ontology categories
  Go_results1 <- enrichGO(gene = genes_to_test_low, 
                          OrgDb = "org.Hs.eg.db", 
                          keyType = "SYMBOL", 
                          ont = "MF", 
                          pvalueCutoff = 0.01, 
                          qvalueCutoff = 0.05)
  
  Go_results2 <- enrichGO(gene = genes_to_test_low, 
                          OrgDb = "org.Hs.eg.db", 
                          keyType = "SYMBOL", 
                          ont = "CC", 
                          pvalueCutoff = 0.01, 
                          qvalueCutoff = 0.05)
  
  Go_results3 <- enrichGO(gene = genes_to_test_low, 
                          OrgDb = "org.Hs.eg.db", 
                          keyType = "SYMBOL", 
                          ont = "BP", 
                          pvalueCutoff = 0.01, 
                          qvalueCutoff = 0.05)
  
  Go_results4 <- enrichGO(gene = genes_to_test_low, 
                          OrgDb = "org.Hs.eg.db", 
                          keyType = "SYMBOL", 
                          ont = "ALL", 
                          pvalueCutoff = 0.05, 
                          qvalueCutoff = 0.05)
  
  # Function to generate and save dotplots
  save_dotplot <- function(go_results, filename) {
    fit <- dotplot(go_results, showCategory = 8, orderBy = "GeneRatio") +
      aes(shape = I(16), color = I("#18bdc2")) +
      theme(legend.position = "right") +
      guides(fill = "none")
    
    ggsave(
      filename = filename,
      plot = fit,
      path = plot_dir,
      device = "pdf",
      width = 8,
      height = 14,
      dpi = 600
    )
  }
  
  # Save dot plots for each GO result
  save_dotplot(Go_results1, "epilepsy_GO_MF_lower1overf_dotplot.pdf")
  save_dotplot(Go_results2, "epilepsy_GO_CC_lower1overf_dotplot.pdf")
  save_dotplot(Go_results3, "epilepsy_GO_BP_lower1overf_dotplot.pdf")
  save_dotplot(Go_results4, "epilepsy_GO_ALL_lower1overf_dotplot.pdf")
  
  cat("GO enrichment plots for flat 1/f saved\n")
} else {
  cat("No significant genes found for flat 1/f GO enrichment\n")
}
```

## 6. GO Enrichment - Steep 1/f (Higher in high1overf)

```{r}
# Filter genes with negative log2FC (higher in high1overf) and significant p-value
genes_to_test_high <- rownames(result[result$avg_log2FC < -0.25 & result$p_val_adj < 0.05, ])

cat("Genes higher in steep 1/f:", length(genes_to_test_high), "\n")

if (length(genes_to_test_high) > 0) {
  # Perform GO Enrichment for different ontology categories
  Go_results5 <- enrichGO(gene = genes_to_test_high, 
                          OrgDb = "org.Hs.eg.db", 
                          keyType = "SYMBOL", 
                          ont = "MF", 
                          pvalueCutoff = 0.01, 
                          qvalueCutoff = 0.05)
  
  Go_results6 <- enrichGO(gene = genes_to_test_high, 
                          OrgDb = "org.Hs.eg.db", 
                          keyType = "SYMBOL", 
                          ont = "CC", 
                          pvalueCutoff = 0.01, 
                          qvalueCutoff = 0.05)
  
  Go_results7 <- enrichGO(gene = genes_to_test_high, 
                          OrgDb = "org.Hs.eg.db", 
                          keyType = "SYMBOL", 
                          ont = "BP", 
                          pvalueCutoff = 0.01, 
                          qvalueCutoff = 0.05)
  
  Go_results8 <- enrichGO(gene = genes_to_test_high, 
                          OrgDb = "org.Hs.eg.db", 
                          keyType = "SYMBOL", 
                          ont = "ALL", 
                          pvalueCutoff = 0.05, 
                          qvalueCutoff = 0.05)
  
  # Function to generate and save dotplots
  save_dotplot_2 <- function(go_results, filename) {
    fit <- dotplot(go_results, showCategory = 8, orderBy = "GeneRatio") +
      aes(shape = I(16), color = I("#f3766e")) +
      theme(legend.position = "right") +
      guides(fill = "none")
    
    ggsave(
      filename = filename,
      plot = fit,
      path = plot_dir,
      device = "pdf",
      width = 8,
      height = 14,
      dpi = 600
    )
  }
  
  # Save dot plots for each GO result
  save_dotplot_2(Go_results5, "epilepsy_GO_MF_high1overf_dotplot.pdf")
  save_dotplot_2(Go_results6, "epilepsy_GO_CC_high1overf_dotplot.pdf")
  save_dotplot_2(Go_results7, "epilepsy_GO_BP_high1overf_dotplot.pdf")
  save_dotplot_2(Go_results8, "epilepsy_GO_ALL_high1overf_dotplot.pdf")
  
  cat("GO enrichment plots for steep 1/f saved\n")
} else {
  cat("No significant genes found for steep 1/f GO enrichment\n")
}
```

## 7. Summary

```{r}
cat("=== Differential Expression Summary ===\n")
cat("Total genes tested:", nrow(result), "\n")
cat("Significant genes (p_val_adj < 0.05):", sum(result$p_val_adj < 0.05, na.rm = TRUE), "\n")
cat("Genes with |log2FC| > 0.25:", sum(abs(result$avg_log2FC) > 0.25, na.rm = TRUE), "\n")
cat("Significant AND |log2FC| > 0.25:", sum(result$p_val_adj < 0.05 & abs(result$avg_log2FC) > 0.25, na.rm = TRUE), "\n\n")

cat("Outputs created:\n")
cat("1. CSV:", csv_path, "\n")
cat("2. Plots saved to:", plot_dir, "\n")
cat("   - epilepsy_volcano_labeled.pdf\n")
cat("   - epilepsy_volcano_nolabel.pdf\n")
if (length(genes_to_test_low) > 0) {
  cat("   - epilepsy_GO_MF_lower1overf_dotplot.pdf\n")
  cat("   - epilepsy_GO_CC_lower1overf_dotplot.pdf\n")
  cat("   - epilepsy_GO_BP_lower1overf_dotplot.pdf\n")
  cat("   - epilepsy_GO_ALL_lower1overf_dotplot.pdf\n")
}
if (length(genes_to_test_high) > 0) {
  cat("   - epilepsy_GO_MF_high1overf_dotplot.pdf\n")
  cat("   - epilepsy_GO_CC_high1overf_dotplot.pdf\n")
  cat("   - epilepsy_GO_BP_high1overf_dotplot.pdf\n")
  cat("   - epilepsy_GO_ALL_high1overf_dotplot.pdf\n")
}
```
